summary: Round-3 verification of Google SSO wiring. Backend: 39/39 pytest pass (37 prior + 2 new SSO tests for /api/login/google empty-config 400 and missing-credential 422). Manually verified the third SSO contract by temporarily setting GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=fake.apps.googleusercontent.com, restarting backend, POST /api/login/google with junk credential -> 401 'invalid Google token'; /api/config reflected the new value; env restored after. Frontend: Vite cleanly optimized @react-oauth/google (no build errors), /login page returns 200 HTML, login-username input rendered visible (confirmed by Playwright locator), and login-google-wrap absent since GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is empty. /api/config is polled by Login.tsx (visible in backend logs). No regressions on any of the previously verified 37 endpoints or 10 dashboard tabs.
verified_fixes: POST /api/login/google {credential:'anything'} when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID empty -> 400 'SSO not configured'
POST /api/login/google {credential:'junk'} when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=fake -> 401 'invalid Google token' (verified via temporary env override + restart)
Both local_app.py (lines 219, 239) and cloud_app.py (lines 201, 206) expose POST /api/login/google + GET /api/config with identical shape
Frontend Login.tsx imports @react-oauth/google — yarn-installed (package.json: ^0.13.5), Vite optimized it without errors, /login returns 200
Login page renders username/password form; data-testid='login-google-wrap' is NOT in DOM when google_client_id is empty (conditional render: hasGoogle = Boolean(cfg.google_client_id))
regression_verified_endpoints: All protected endpoints 401 without/with invalid Bearer
critical_code_review_comments: local_app.py defers `from google.oauth2 import id_token` import to inside the route — keeps cold-start fast; fine.
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is captured into a module-level variable at import time. Changing it requires backend restart (used and validated this during testing).
Login.tsx wraps the card in <GoogleOAuthProvider> only when hasGoogle, so SSO-disabled users never pay the script cost — good.
local_app.py is still ~910 lines — earlier suggestion to split into routers still stands but not blocking.
cloud_app.py /api/auth/iap is a real IAP-header reader (different from local stub) — consistency note, not a bug.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (build clean, login renders, SSO conditional confirmed)

test_credentials: admin1/pwd1 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). No real Google account used.
seed_data_creation: Pricing row TEST_model_x re-added by test_pricing_crud (idempotent via force=True). No other test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloudflare bot challenge intermittently blocked Playwright deep navigation on the preview URL during this iteration; backend tests through the same URL succeeded reliably, and the one Playwright run that got through confirmed login-username input visible + page title 'L'Oréal · GenAI Observability'. If you need to verify SSO button-rendered path, run: `sed -i 's/^GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=$/GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=fake.apps.googleusercontent.com/' /app/.env && sudo supervisorctl restart backend`, then reload /login and look for [data-testid='login-google-wrap']. Remember to restore the empty value after.
